steps: Input kind = project_or_repo; only the GitHub repo URL was supplied.
Repo https://github.com/google-research/bert is the canonical implementation repo for BERT.
Repo README links to the associated paper: arXiv 1810.04805 'BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding'.
Canonical PDF fetched from https://arxiv.org/pdf/1810.04805 (775 166 bytes, 6 pages, PDF 1.5).
All major sections (Abstract, Introduction, BERT, Pre-training BERT, Fine-tuning BERT, Experiments, Conclusion, References) present and ordered.
